playbook.intent: Signed offer → first merged PR + first on-call shadow within 14 days.
playbook.scope: A new product-dev hire walks in on day 1 and walks out of day 14 with a merged PR, an on-call shadow under their belt, a 30/60/90-day plan filed, and a buddy. Their CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md context pyramid is set up; they have run the dev loop locally; they know the incident protocol; the team has a written retro of how week-1 went.

success-criteria.criterion: 30/60/90-day plan filed by end of day 3
Local dev loop running by end of day 2
First on-call shadow completed by day 14
Day-14 retro between hire + manager + buddy
Hire has read and acknowledged incident-runbook + secrets policy

stage.name: Pre-arrival prep
stage.intent: Accounts, repo access, buddy, 30/60/90 skeleton ready before day 1.

tasks.task: Provision laptop + accounts using secrets-management protocol
Assign a buddy and a manager 1:1 cadence
Pre-fill 30/60/90 skeleton tied to a small first owned ticket
Confirm EVP messaging on day-1 welcome packet

stage.decision-gate: Advance when laptop boots, repo clones, buddy and manager are calendared. Otherwise day 1 burns on logistics.

stage.name: Week 1: orient + first PR
stage.intent: Hire understands repo layout, runs dev loop, ships a small first PR.

tasks.task: Pair with buddy on dev loop locally
Pick a starter ticket with clear AC
Open and merge a small PR with conventional commits

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the hire has merged a PR they understand and can explain back to their buddy.

stage.name: Week 2: incident protocol + on-call shadow
stage.intent: Hire is incident-literate and has shadowed at least one on-call rotation slot.

tasks.task: Walk the incident runbook + read-only-investigation default
Shadow an on-call slot with the buddy
Dry-run a postmortem auto-draft on a synthetic incident

stage.decision-gate: Advance when hire can articulate the read-only-investigation default and the approval-gate boundary unaided.

stage.name: Day-14 retro + retention loop
stage.intent: Capture what worked, what didn't, what to keep — wire to retention.

tasks.task: Update mistake-memory / patterns-memory with onboarding lessons
Confirm 30/60/90 plan still fits or rewrite

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written retro. If the hire stops at week 14 with no retro, the next hire repeats the same friction.

extra.value: [Sourcing + screening — covered by hiring-screen-take-home-review and hire-to-productive-60-days-in-house, Long-term performance reviews — out of scope for 14-day window, Company-wide HR compliance training — handled by HR centrally]
[Signed offer with start date, Laptop + accounts provisioned before day 1, 'Buddy assigned at offer-signature time, not day 1', Repos have CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md context pyramid in place]

['Buddy assigned on day 1, not before — wastes the first 48h', Starter ticket too ambitious — kills momentum, Skipping the incident protocol walkthrough — first page becomes the lesson, Treating onboarding as 'HR's job' — engineering owns ramp]

['Can the hire explain CLAUDE.md context pyramid back to me?', 'Did the first PR pass our normal gates with no special exceptions?', 'Did the hire ask at least one good repo-shaped question that surfaced a real gap?']

{human: faion get-content hire-onboard-product-dev-2-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content hire-onboard-product-dev-2-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content hire-onboard-product-dev-2-weeks --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
